phases.title: Boot exact fixture
phases.subtitle: Read contract parameters, addresses and source fingerprints

phases.title: Bind participation
phases.subtitle: Versioned responsibility receipts for every active participant

phases.title: Register validator nodes
phases.subtitle: Direct node.agi.eth ownership, key, region and capabilities

phases.title: Create the job
phases.subtitle: Exact ERC-20 approval, exact-transfer escrow and ENS create hook

phases.title: Assign the agent
phases.subtitle: ENS authorization, AGI-NFT payout snapshot and duration-weighted agent bond

phases.title: Lock authority bonds
phases.subtitle: Separate GoalOS reference overlay for paid, trusted and reusable authority

phases.title: Execute and prove
phases.subtitle: Two-day bounded work run, ProofBundle URI and proof-root binding

phases.title: Validate independently
phases.subtitle: Three approvals, one dissent, four exact validator bonds

phases.title: Settle deterministically
phases.subtitle: Challenge window, permissionless finalize, slashing, NFT and ENS terminal hook

phases.title: Grant bounded authority
phases.subtitle: Paid, trusted, challenge-safe and reusable transitions; release overlay bonds

phases.title: Admit to Chronicle
phases.subtitle: Commit Reality epoch and sponsor attestation

phases.title: Open Mission 2
phases.subtitle: Constitutional canary only—no broad propagation without delayed evidence

contracts.name: AGIJobManager
contracts.deploymentStatus: verified mainnet address; current official repository/source semantics

contracts.name: ENSJobPages
contracts.deploymentStatus: official console fallback address; best-effort hook target

contracts.name: UserResponsibilityReceiptRegistryV4
contracts.deploymentStatus: deterministic reference fixture; not a claimed live deployment

contracts.name: AGINodeRegistry
contracts.deploymentStatus: deterministic reference fixture; source says unaudited

contracts.name: BondedAuthorityKernel
contracts.deploymentStatus: deterministic reference fixture; source says unaudited/no live value

contracts.name: ConstitutionalUpgradeRegistry
contracts.deploymentStatus: deterministic reference fixture; canary-only RSI epilogue

boundary: Reference-fixture calls are orchestrated beside the deployed-core rail; they are not represented as internal calls of the deployed AGIJobManager.
